primary_sources.title: Letters Patent of Appointment of Prime Minister, 16 July 1981, YDPA Sultan Ahmad Shah
UMNO General Assembly Resolution electing Mahathir as President, June 1981

notes: Mahathir Mohamad becomes 4th PM of Malaysia, succeeding Hussein Onn (resigned for health reasons). The institutional consequences are out of proportion to the change-of-personnel event: 22-year tenure that reshapes the executive's relationship with the judiciary (1988 crisis), the monarchy (constitutional amendments 1983 and 1993), the economy (Look East, privatisation, Bumiputera commercial layer), and the opposition (1987 Operation Lalang detentions, 1998 Anwar sacking). The succession event is encoded here; downstream consequences are separate event records.
